articles.title: The Walt Disney Company (NYSE:DIS) Receives Consensus Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" from Analysts
articles.summary: The Walt Disney Company (NYSE: DIS) has garnered a "Moderate Buy" consensus recommendation from 23 research firms, with an average 12-month price target of $134.47. The company recently exceeded quarterly earnings expectations with an EPS of $1.57 and revenue of $25.17 billion, a 6.5% year-over-year increase. Despite a new lawsuit concerning facial recognition, analysts have lifted some earnings estimates, and Disney has launched a "Blockbuster Summer" campaign to boost brand momentum.

articles.title: Disney and Epic Games Bring ‘Star Wars’ Stories to Fortnite Fans
articles.summary: Disney and Epic Games are partnering to integrate 'Star Wars' content into Fortnite, coinciding with the theatrical release of 'Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu'. This collaboration includes a dedicated "Watch Party Island" in Fortnite featuring a sneak peek of the film and developer Q&A, and the release of a Star Wars Toolkit for creators. The initiative extends to Disney Parks attractions, aiming to provide interactive and immersive fan experiences across various platforms.

articles.title: Hulu on Disney+ Just Got Better: What You Need to Know About Linking Your Profiles
articles.summary: Disney+ is enhancing the integration of Hulu content by allowing eligible bundle subscribers to link their Hulu profiles, bringing watch history, watchlists, and recommendations directly into Disney+. This change ensures a seamless viewing experience, with Hulu content appearing in personalized sections and a dedicated Hulu Hub on Disney+. Upcoming features also include a new Live Guide for Disney+ users.
